headline: GoDaddy Inquiry Puts Spotlight On Promotional Pricing And Investor Disclosure Risks
summary: Kaplan Fox & Kilsheimer LLP has begun investigating GoDaddy (NYSE:GDDY) over its promotional pricing strategy for dotcom domains. The firm is reviewing whether GoDaddy adequately disclosed that the promotion led to greater than expected demand, reducing upfront bookings and near term revenue. The inquiry focuses on potential securities law issues and what this could mean for shareholder transparency and legal risk. GoDaddy, trading at $91.39, sits at the center of this new legal scrutiny at...
